manifest.name: uuu.gl Markdown Uploader

name: uuu.gl Markdown Uploader

releases.author: johnkim05
releases.description:
## 📱 Cross-Platform Mobile Support

This release adds full iOS and Android mobile support to the uuu.gl Markdown Uploader plugin!

### ✨ What's New

- **Mobile Compatibility**: Plugin now works on iOS and Android devices
- **Cross-Platform Authentication**: Browser-based OAuth flow works across all platforms
- **Single Codebase**: One plugin for Desktop (Windows/Mac/Linux) and Mobile (iOS/Android)

### 🔧 Technical Changes

- `isDesktopOnly: false` in manifest.json
- Platform-specific browser opening (Electron shell vs Obsidian mobile API)
- `obsidian://` URL scheme for authentication callbacks
- Browser-based authentication page at https://uuu.gl/auth/obsidian

### 🚀 Authentication Flow

1. Plugin opens authentication page in browser
2. User signs in with Google
3. Secure token generated by Firebase
4. Redirects back to Obsidian via `obsidian://` URL
5. Plugin receives token and authenticates

### ✅ Compatibility

- **Desktop (Windows/Mac/Linux)**: Works exactly as before, no changes
- **Mobile (iOS/Android)**: Now fully supported!

### 📦 Installation

For Obsidian Community Plugins users: Update will be available automatically
For manual installation: Download main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css

---

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
releases.name: v1.4.0 - iOS & Android Mobile Support

releases.author: johnkim05
releases.description:
## Features

✨ One-Click Upload - Upload your notes directly from Obsidian
📸 Image Preservation - Automatically uploads and embeds all images
🔗 Custom Short URLs - Create memorable URLs
🔒 Password Protection - Optionally protect your notes
💾 Auto-Save - Real-time auto-save with version control
🎨 Beautiful Rendering - GitHub Flavored Markdown

## Installation

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` and place them in your vault's `.obsidian/plugins/uuugl-uploader/` directory.
